crons.name: heartbeat
crons.prompt: Heartbeat: check time (PST). Quick checks — (1) git log --oneline -5 for clearpath, lifecycle-killer, nonprofit-hub, note new commits. (2) Check Clearpath fireflies_meetings for last 2h, send Telegram summary to 6690120787 if new. (3) If briefing due and not sent today, dispatch it to a background Agent so the main session stays responsive for Telegram. Use background agents for any heavy data pulls (Gmail, Calendar). Otherwise HEARTBEAT_OK.
